How's it going everyone? In this video we're covering creating two appointment types in Acuity. One's going to be for people doing the 42-day detox challenge at home. The other one's going to be for your members. We're also going to go and put those on our tracking document and then also show you where to put those links into the ClickFunnels. Go ahead and open up Acuity, log in if you need to. Once you're in Acuity, look for business settings on the left. Go and click on that. We want to choose this option, appointment types. It's the second one down. On this screen we're looking for this green new type of service button at the top. Go and click on that button. We're going to give this appointment name, something relevant. This is going to be something that your members will be able to see when they're scheduling the appointment as well. So make sure it's something that you're okay with them seeing and also helps them know what they're scheduling their appointment for. So we're going to do 42-day detox midway check-in. Duration, it can be whatever you're comfortable with. We're going to leave that 30 minutes but you can change it if you want to. You do need to associate this with at least one calendar. So if you made a calendar specifically for the 42-day detox, just click a check mark next to that. Otherwise, just pick whichever calendar you want these appointments to go to. If everything looks good, the name, duration, and the calendar, go and hit this green Create Appointment Type button at the bottom. Going to take you back to the Appointment Type page. We want to scroll all the way down to the bottom. That's where it puts all the new appointments types that we make. And to the right of our new appointment, we see this direct scheduling link. Go and click on that, scroll down again, and it shows us a link. We're going to click this green copy button to copy it to the clipboard. Let's head over to our tracking document. We're going to paste that right there next to the 42-day detox midway check-in URL. And that link will actually be used in the button in the click funnel. And when they click on it, it's going to take them right to the scheduling page so they can put in their appointment directly. Let's go ahead and head back to Acuity. Let's scroll all the way back up to the top and click this green New Type of Service button. This is going to be for the At Home Challenge, so I'm going to make sure to indicate that in here. That way, when you look at the appointment, you know which one is which. Name looks good, our duration is great, and let's go and associate it with a calendar that we want these appointments to go to. And then hit this green Create Appointment Type button at the bottom. Go and scroll down to the bottom again, and there's our new appointment type. This is the At Home one. So we'll hit this direct scheduling link to the right. Then we're going to scroll down, and it gives us another link. Go ahead and click on that green Copy button right there. Let's head back to our tracking document. We're going to go and paste it right here next to the At Home Midway Check-in URL. And if you notice, these are different numbers. That lets you know that you've got different links for both of them. That's exactly what we want to see. Let's go ahead and click Funnels. Log in to Click Funnels if you need to. At the top, we want to move our mouse over Click Funnels, and then click on Funnels right there. This is going to take us to the page where we can see all of our funnels. I'm going to go and open up this first one here, the 42-day detox challenge. This is for people doing the challenge at home. I'm sorry, this is for people doing the challenge in the gym, so we want to go and update that link specifically. On the left-hand side, we see Membership Area. Go and click on that. We want to scroll all the way down to week four. Week four, Accountability Check-in. So once you find this one under week four, go and click on this Open Editor button. It's going to open the editor for this specific page. We're looking for this button here, Schedule Your Check-in. If you notice it gives you a warning right there that it's not set, that's probably what you're going to see. Go ahead and click Schedule Your Check-in. Then click this Set Action button. It's set to go to a website URL. It's set to open a new tab window. So we need to put our link in there. If there's anything already in here, another link, go ahead and delete it out. Otherwise you'll see this enter a website URL and that's fine. Let's head to our tracking document. We're going to copy this, and so this is for people doing the challenge in the gym. We're going to get that one right there. Go ahead and head back to our Click Funnel. Go ahead and paste in that link right there. Now that we have our link in there, I'm going to go and hit the Enter key on my keyboard. I'm doing that while that blinking cursor is right there. That way it saves the link. Sometimes if you don't hit the Enter key after you paste a link in there, it doesn't actually accept the change. So I pasted it in there, hit the Enter key on my keyboard. Go ahead and hit back. I'm going to click away from that sidebar. If you notice it gives you a little preview of what link is in there, and that's great. Let's go ahead and save. Save again for good measure. Hit this back arrow to exit, and that's at the top left. Now I want to make sure that that link is actually working and it takes into the right page. So here we want to click on Membership Access on the left. Right under where it says 42-day detox, we're looking for the square with the arrow pointing to the right. It says Preview Page Split Test Version. Click on that button, and it's going to open up your Click Funnel in a new tab. This is going to be exactly what your members see once they get logged in. Let's go ahead and go to Week 4. Choose Week 4 Accountability Check-in. We're going to click this Schedule Your Check-in button. It takes us right to the Acuity Scheduling page where they're able to pick their appointments, and that's great. That's perfect and what we want to see. You see the name of the appointment type right there? Let's us know that we got the right link. We're going to close out of Acuity. I'm going to close out of this Preview. Let's go to the other Click Funnel. So I'm going to move my mouse over Click Funnels at the top, and then click on Funnels right there. We're going to choose our At Home Challenge this time. So we're at Home 42-day Detox Challenge. I'm going to click on that funnel. It's going to open this main page. Let's click on Membership Area on the left. And just like before, we're looking for Week 4. So there's Week 4 Lesson Number 1, Week 4 Accountability Check-in. Go ahead and click the Open Editor button to the right of that. It's going to open up the Page Editor. And we're looking for the Schedule Your Check-in button. It shows us that the action is not set. That's what you want to see. Go ahead and click on the button itself. It gives us a sidebar, and we're going to click Set Action There. It's set to go to a website URL and open a new tab slash window. I'm going to click back to our tracking document. I'm going to find our At Home Midway Check-in URL. I'm going to select that, copy it to my clipboard, head back to Click Funnels, click where it says Enter our Website URL, and I'm going to paste it. I'm going to hit Enter on my keyboard to make sure it took it. Click this back button right there. I'm going to click out of it. I'm going to save once and save again for good measure. Let's go and hit this exit arrow at the top left. Let's go ahead and make sure that this one works as well. We're going to click Membership Access at the top left. Right underneath the preview, we're going to click this square with the arrow pointing to the top right again. I'm going to open a new tab, and this is directly to the funnel, just like your members would see when they get logged in. Let's go to Week 4 and Week 4 Accountability Check-in. There's that Schedule Your Check-in button we just edited. I'm going to click on that, and then open the Scheduling page, and it says At Home 42-day Detox Midway Check-in. That's perfect. That lets us know we got the right link, and this is exactly what your clients are going to see when they get logged in and click that same link. So that's all we needed to do to get that set up in our Click Funnel. We can go ahead and close out this page, close out the preview. Let's go ahead and close out and go back to our QT. That's it for this video. Hope you enjoyed it.
